body:
Sarah, just wanted to follow up on our conversation from last week about the portfolio review cadence. I've been thinking more about the feedback you gave on [Halfway Capital](orgs/halfway-capital)'s approach to early-stage climate diligence, and I think you raised some genuinely valid points about how we weight team composition versus technical moat at the seed stage. Would you be open to a 30-minute call sometime before the 15th to dig into that further? I'm also curious whether you've had any recent exposure to founders working at the intersection of grid infrastructure and ML-based demand forecasting — that's a space we're watching closely right now and your network tends to surface interesting people before anyone else does. Let me know what works for your schedule.

— Amara
